recommendations.title: Noroi: The Curse
recommendations.overview: A documentary filmmaker explores seemingly unrelated paranormal incidents connected by the legend of an ancient demon.

recommendations.title: Sadako vs. Kayako
recommendations.overview: A girl, Yūri Kurahashi, after watching a cursed videotape together with her friend in a haunted house, becomes trapped in a conflict between the two murderous ghosts: Sadako Yamamura and Kayako Saeki.

recommendations.title: Grotesque
recommendations.overview: An unnamed doctor has always had everything he's ever wanted, but that has only made him develop more extreme and depraved needs. He kidnaps a young couple in the prime of their life together and forces them into a game of torment that slowly extingu

recommendations.title: The Face of Another
recommendations.overview: A businessman with a disfigured face obtains a lifelike mask from his new doctor, but the mask starts altering his personality and causing him to question his identity.

recommendations.title: Outer Space
recommendations.overview: A young woman move towards a house that holds a potentially dangerous spirit that has been tormenting her. The woman tries to fight against the film itself as it starts to cause the world to collapse.

recommendations.title: All Your Faces
recommendations.overview: Since 2014, France's restorative justice programmes have offered a safe space for supervised dialogue between offenders and victims. Grégoire, Nawelle, and Sabine, victims of heists and violent robberies, agree to join one of these discussion groups

recommendations.title: Even Lambs Have Teeth
recommendations.overview: Two young women terrorized by a group of small town psychos seek revenge on their tormentors.

recommendations.title: Death Whisperer 2
recommendations.overview: Three years after his sister's death, Yak relentlessly searches for the dark spirit that killed her in hopes of seeking revenge.

recommendations.title: Demon
recommendations.overview: A bridegroom is possessed by an unquiet spirit in the midst of his own wedding celebration, in this clever take on the Jewish legend of the dybbuk.

recommendations.title: Sabrina
recommendations.overview: A toy manufacturer and his wife are terrorized by a demon after their orphaned niece tries to call her late mother's spirit.
